name: Mimesis
description: High-performance fake data generator for Python supporting 46 locales, covering addresses, persons, payments, cryptographic and science data.

seo.title: Mimesis — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Mimesis: High-performance fake data generator for Python supporting 46 locales, covering addresses, persons, payments, cryptographic and science data.

when_to_use: Generate fake data for 46 locales in Python tests
High-performance fixture generation for database seeding
Typed fake data for Pydantic models in FastAPI tests
Address, payment, and person data for integration tests

pros: Very fast synthetic data generator for Python
cons: Overlaps heavily with Faker, ecosystem smaller
No relational integrity across generated rows
Not a full test-data management platform
review.verdict: A faster, cleaner Faker alternative for Python, still just a data generator and nothing more.
review.best_for: Python teams needing quick, realistic fake data in tests and demos
review.not_for: Teams that need referentially-correct datasets across many tables

lock_in.reason: Free OSS Python fake data gen
